creator: kai@FreeBSD.org
text:
Created attachment 192753
py-u-msgpack-python.shar

Hello,

attached is the shar file of the Python package py-u-msgpack-python, a portable, lightweight, MessagePack (de)serializer.

It is the smaller variant of devel/py-msgpack and is compatible with both Python 2 and 3, as well as CPython and PyPy implementations of Python.

Fully compliance is given with the latest MessagePack specification. Support is also available for the new binary UTF-8 string and application-defined ext
types.

QA:
~~~
- poudriere (11.1-RELEASE amd64 + i386) for each py27 and py36 flavor -> OK
- portlint -> OK
